name: Koulourakia Me Sousame (Sesame Cookies)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour and baking powder into a bowl.
2. Make a well in the center of the dry mixture.
3. Brown the butter until it begins to smoke, then add it to the flour mixture. Cool slightly.
4. Rub the butter and eggs between your palms until well blended.
5. Make another well in the flour mixture and add the warm milk; mix thoroughly.
6. Beat the eggs and sugar in a separate bowl until thick. Add this to the flour mixture.
7. Add the vanilla extract.
8. Knead the dough until it is soft.
9. Roll or pat out the dough, shape into desired cookies, and roll in sesame seeds.
10. Bake on a buttered baking sheet in a preheated 350°F (175°C) oven for 20 minutes.
